subtab.title: Enhanced Product Reviews
subtab.description: This section allows to configure the behavior of the enhanced product reviews section

enhancedProductReviews.container.title: Product Reviews Container
enhancedProductReviews.container.description: Placeholder id used to append the product reviews section

enhancedProductReviews.containerPosition.title: Product Reviews Container Position
enhancedProductReviews.containerPosition.description: Position of the product reviews section regarding the container

enhancedProductReviews.displayEmptyStars.title: Display Empty Stars
enhancedProductReviews.displayEmptyStars.description: Display or Hide the stars section when there are no ratings

enhancedProductReviews.newReviewLabel.title: PDP - New Review Label
enhancedProductReviews.newReviewLabel.description: Label/Text used on the product details page when there is no review
enhancedProductReviews.newReviewLabel.default: Be the first to write a review
